entry.title: Re: Integration of Microsoft Teams into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Hi Sebastian. Please report it in as a SAP incident via the usual support channels. Looks like a bug and I have heard the same from another customer this week so an official support incident is the best approach.

entry.title: Re: Using Responsibility Rules in Situation Handling (2/2)
entry.content:
Hi @Luis_Lara,

In the blog post Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5) you find an example for creating a rule and a custom context. This should answer your questions. You can also refer to SAP Help Responsibility Management.

Best
 Angelika

entry.title: Re: Limit the number of goals from populating in the perf...
entry.content: Hi @MridulSharmaSF , I tried replicating this in lower instances, this does not work, even after giving min and max goals, it is not staying within this limit.

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2408
entry.content:
We're excited to share the latest news around SAP Asset Performance Management 2408. This blog provides videos on our latest updates, including Joule's AI-powered integration with SAP Help Portal and enhanced features like global operating contexts in strategy assessments for classes, and time-saving enhancements to FMEA assessments.

SAP Joule Co-Pilot Integration to SAP Help Portal

With Joule, our new generative AI copilot, you now have conversational access to the product documentation for SAP Asset Performance Management application. Just enter your query or question in plain natural language, and Joule searches SAP Asset Performance Management Help Portal to find the answer. Joule summarizes the search results in the background. This summarization is then displayed to you as Joule's answer to your question, along with the top three search results. If you select the title link of a result, you're taken directly to the relevant topic on SAP Help Portal.

Watch the video:

For more information about Joule in SAP Asset Performance Management, see 3503073


Asset Reliability Engineering

Global Operating Context and Conditions in Strategy Assessments for Classes

Operating contexts and conditions help define specific environment in which equipment operates, such as temperature ranges, or environmental factors. This is crucial for accurately identifying potential issues and defining the right risk mitigation strategy, making the assessment process more aligned with actual operational needs.

We additionally now also have a global operating context and condition. This feature allows you to set overarching characteristics and values that apply uniformly across all operating contexts and conditions within a given assessment for a class. For reliability engineers, this is particularly beneficial as it ensures efficiency, reduces the time spent including the common characteristics and values in each operating context and condition within the given assessment individually, and improves decision-making by adhering to high-level operational standards.

By combining both global and local operating contexts, the system can differentiate and integrate these filters for a more precise selection of technical objects. This dual-context approach ensures that while local nuances are addressed, there is also adherence to global standards, leading to more relevant and compatible technical object proposals.

Enhanced FMEA Assessments: Support of Multiple Technical Objects

We’ve enhanced FMEA assessments to be more efficient and scalable by enabling the management and evaluation of multiple technical objects simultaneously, provided they belong to the same class, failure data profile, and planning plant. This reduces manual effort and ensures consistent risk management and maintenance planning as your asset base grows.
Watch the video:
 

Keep In Touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Register right now for our upcoming webcast What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2408 (incl. 2407, 2406) and  on September 4 (10am EDT, 4pm CET) 
  • Check out all past and present Intelligent Asset Management webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. 
  • Check some of our recent blogs:
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2407 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2406 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2405 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
    • SAP Asset Performance Management Embedding Cumulocity IoT to Drive Innovations in IoT and AI
    • How AI-based Anomaly Detection empowers reliability engineers in SAP Asset Performance Management
    • SAP Asset Performance Management – FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis)
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2409 release update!

entry.title: Re: Is there a feed feature in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2?
entry.content:
Hi Nicolai,

This is not (yet) available in V2. You need to ask SAP if this will come in the future.

Simon

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval sc...
entry.content:
Thank you for your reply. I understand that it is the workitem id of the user decision task. I will give it a try.

I have set the URL in the first answer, and when I accessed it from WorkflowTaskURL in CDS view I_WorkflowTaskURL, the following error was output. Can you please advise which setting is incorrect?

The roll message is displayed, but it is accessible when accessed via MyInbox from FioriLaunchPad.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Dissappearing comments in SAC
entry.content:
Hi @richard_kilian,

You can see from the request that the commentModel is empty, that means there're no comment returned from backend for the request.

You can check if you have adjust the filter for the table which will change the context of comments  and result in no comment returned.

You can also check if the backend works by adding a comment and to see weather it is returned. If not, it should be a bug.

 

Best Regards

Lisa Sun

entry.title: Re: Role Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud V2 is supported?
entry.content:
Hi Niko,

Yes there is:

Simon

entry.title: BDC Questionnaire
entry.content:

I worked previously within SAP and I use to find the BDC Questionnaires per module related to a S/4 Hana greenfield implementation in Roadmap viewer.

Now I'm working in a client company and I have no rights to see that anymore. Any tips on how access the BDC Questionnaire to help me in my future implementation?

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP: Defaulting action parameters with complex business logic in a Fiori Elements applicati
entry.content:
@Ramjee_korada,

I have two questions?
Is there a way to set the field with default value to read-only?
Is there a way to call the default function with multiple instance which like call action with annotation @UI.lineItem: [{ type: #FOR_ACTION, dataAction: 'ChangeStatus', invocationGrouping: #CHANGE_SET }]?
We have a requirement need to determine default value with multiple instance, if all instances have the same value, then it can be determined, otherwise, error need to be raised.

Best Regards,
Wei

This will allow us to schedule some calls to assist you and work towards resolving your issue.

Kaoutar

entry.title: Safety Stock Allocation from Stock Segmented Stock
entry.content:
Hi, 

I would like to know if there are any methods or configuration changes to consider segmented stock during safety stock allocation in the MRP run in SAP S4HANA. If not, I would appreciate it if we could maintain safety stock at the stock segment level. Could you please advise on this?

Thanks in advance,

Malith

entry.title: Re: Creating a discount amount column in sap business one
entry.content: i have same issue is there any solation

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Free Text Field/Dimension?
entry.content:
Hello - so this can be achieved by:

1) Add Member functionality on the Milestone dimension, so that they can right click, and add new master data in this way:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/80c9604348b9465da8098492811fd2ee.html

2) You can write script which allows the user to create master data in a more structured way, for example if you want to force the update of certain properties or to auto-create the ID, for example. There are lots of blogs on this, here is one:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-application-to-add-master-data-to-a-planning-model/ba-p/13522496

 

Thanks
David

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano, hope all doing good.

I am very interested in this digital skills opportunity. I have past 7 years+ job experience and with some part time freelancing. 5 months ago I have joined a well known company where I am a part of SAP implementation, currently my job role as an IT junior officer on contract till the implementation, I know I have already got an outstanding opportunity to get hands on experience of SAP implementation from start to end. The company initially implementing 7 Core modules of SAP FI / PM / PS / PP / SD / CO & MM. Now its Exploration Phase is ongoing. 

I am very interested in learning SAP Material Management & I am attending SAP MM all sessions and I have prepared notes on google docs. Also I am learning though YouTube and online other resources like official website/ chatgpt. it helps a lot. I have complete Exploring the Basics of External Procurement in SAP S/4HANA - Records of achievement also. But including all of this I am very interested in SAP certification but cant afford right now and I am belonging to the country and here jobs are very limited and only for professionals, the country itself is very beautiful but underrated due to unavailability of latest technology.

The certification i would like to do is Sourcing and Procurement which is relevant to SAP MM. I will be happy to receive a feedback.

Thanks & Regards
Usama Kayani

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps bulk updating backend tables with an Array or records
entry.content:
Problem Solved, Just a follow on my learnings around this for anyone else starting out.
The approach I took to address complex structures via an API was to flatten some of the structures using the Javascript function, collapsing some of the embedded arrays into a string, this then allowed me to populate the table structure in visual cloud functions and also display them on pages.  I am sure there are multiple ways to structure your data, this worked for me.  Im also interested to hear if anyone has some guidance on working with data structures in Build Apps.

entry.title: Service Layer Single Sign On (SSO) example or tutorial
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any tutorial/video/post that explains how to connect to Service Layer with SSO?

I've connect successfully to Service Layer in the past, but can't login when SSO is activated since I always get this error when I try to login into Service Layer via POSTMAN:

 

POST https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/Login
{
    "CompanyDB": "DEMO_US",
    "Password": "MyPass",
    "UserName": "demo"
}
Error message:
{
    "error": {
        "code": 401,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "Internal error: Get access token error,{\"error\":\"invalid_grant\",\"error_description\":\"Invalid user credentials\"}."
        }
    }
}

 

Additionally, the Service Layer PDF manual is very generic on how to connect via SSO and haven't found solutions in other forums/SAP docs. 

Thanks

entry.title: F2101A doesn't check Material status while running MRP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing issues while running MRP with F2101A (Monitor Material Coverage) app

If the material status is blocked for MRP, then app should give that error.

Check Material Coverage app F0251 gives the correct message.

Has anyone implemented or fix the issue?

Regards

Nitin

entry.title: Re: Consuming SOAP service from SAP Build Process Automation

Our goal is to help companies successfully adopt and maximize the value of SAP solutions. I have already joined the Beginner Corner and look forward to engaging with the community, learning from experienced SAP professionals, and contributing what I can as a relative newcomer to the SAP ecosystem. entry.title: Requirements transfer and allocation to another plant
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are having 2 plants, Plant A is only for production and its procurement performed by plant B through requirements transfer (special procurement ) which is then converted to STO. Plant B perform production and procurement for both (A & B). 

Currently we are taking care it through Special procurement but the problem is that when requirements are transferred from Plant A to plant B and plant B also having requirement for the same item , at PO level SAP is unable to distinguish the source of requirement ( Plant A or B) as user wants to segregate the requirements from plant A and B but wants to generate single PO line item to minimize the impact of MPQ/MOQ.

Is there any solution?

entry.title: Re: setFilename dynamically in TPM for AS2 configuration
entry.content: i would create the content modifier and script before the end tag of the iflow, so you can use it in our receiver chanal.

entry.title: Re: Role Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud V2 is supported?
entry.content:
Hi Niko,

Yes it is possible in C4C V2 as well. 
In C4C V2 firstly you have to create layout as below;

1. Go to Settings -> Search for Layouts -> Extensibility -> Page Layout
2. Click on page layout and create new 

3. Next Go to adaptation and make your changes by selecting the created page layout

4. Finally End Adaptation
This will save all your changes

Thanks

Niveditha Krishnam

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Hello,

I noticed that with the activation of TiH in our instance, competency filters in goal plans stop working. Our employees are able to select all competencies/skills within the TiH now.

Do we have any update on how we make filters work again?

Best Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Re: One of my CDS CQL statements doesn't change the backi...
entry.content:
There should be no need for you to do transaction handling. The framework does it for you. When you execute multiple database queries (create, update, delete) they either get all committed or none. The set of transactions is atomic.

I'm also not sure what "_closureVariables" is that you are referring to?

You can just keep it simple:

 

let affectedGroup = await SELECT(_closureVariables.entities.Roles).where(...)
await UPDATE(_closureVariables.entities.Roles).set({submissionBegunAt: new Date().toISOString()}).where(...)
await UPDATE(_closureVariables.entities.Roles).set({status: 'A'}).where(...)
affectedGroup = await SELECT(_closureVariables.entities.Roles).where(...)

 

Now either both the submissionBegunAt as well as status is updated, or neither of the two.

If you want to manually commit in chunks (maybe some statements are not related to each other and have to be executed regardless whether a previous altering statement succeeded), you can define individual transactions like this:

 

await cds.tx(async () => {
  UPDATE(table1).set().where()
})
await cds.tx(async () => {
  UPDATE(table2).set().where()
})

entry.title: SAP Mill Products - problem with material overhead rate
entry.content:
Hello Community,
we try to use the SAP Mill Product solution for using combined orders. We now got a problem with the period ending with the overhead surcharge. According to the SAP description we control the overhead surcharging on level of the combined orders and also settle the material overhead with the settlement rule on to the original orders. But with the period end closing the original orders receive the overhead again. The control buttons in transaction CO43 shows no possibility to not select this original orders.

Is anyone familiar with this problem?

Br
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Statement of Direction - SAP Data Services as of July 2024
entry.content:
Hi Sheebaji,
Thanks for sharing!

Will the following capabilities be added to SAP Data Services 2025:

1. Push output files in format Parquet (currently only format CSV is possible with Data Services 4.3)

2. Enable Microsoft Azure authentication methods such as Microsoft Entra (Currently only windows, NTLM, Kerberos are available)

Thanks, and best regards,
Saleem

entry.title: How to send operation without component assigned to EWM
entry.content:
Hello,

In project we do have production orders with component list, some of the components are assigned to operations with PSA relevant for EWM and PMR gets created. But we do have operation of transfer of preassembled components from one place to the other and that operation is EWM relevant but has no components assigned so it is not getting send to EWM. Is there a way to force system to send this operation to EWM?

Thanks

entry.title: Future receipts of co-products in MRP-LTP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

For a customer we are setting up Long term planning (LTP).
Forecast has been uploaded and requirements have been generated. However some materials are co-products aswell

We run MRP in the following way as we want to take all capacity into account. (Scheduling 2) Because of this planned orders are scheduled on different dates. (We dont care about the dates, we just want to see all capacity needed)

Looking at the MRP results, MRP plans the material to 0 stock, which is good, but afterwards it also comes in as a co-product from another material (last line)

How can we make sure we have the following result:

The planned order should already take the future receipt as a co-product into account.

entry.title: Re: Work Permit / WCM in SAP S4 Hana EAM

entry.title: About Fiori Session Timeout
entry.content:
I have a question about the Fiori timeout.
I would like to know if there are any differences in my understanding.

The software I use is SAP S/4HANA 2020 01FP.

I think there are mainly two ways to set Fiori timeouts.
"①Server-Driven Sign-Out"
"②UI-Driven Sign-Out"
Since ② is not set, the timeout of ① is applied.
However, the SESSION_TIMEOUT_STOP_DATA_REFRESH parameter is not set.
Configuring the Automatic Sign-Out | SAP Help Portal

When I run Tr-CD:SICF_SESSIONS in SAPGUI and check the parameters, they are set as follows.

login/create_sso2_ticket = 3
login/accept_sso2_ticket = 1
login/ticketcache_entries_max = 1000
login/ticketcache_off = 0
login/ticket_only_by_https = 1
icf/set_HTTPonly_flag_on_cookies = 0
icf/user_recheck = 1
http/security_session_timeout = 1800
http/security_context_cache_size = 2500
rdisp/plugin_auto_logout = 1800
rdisp/autothtime = 60

With the above settings, how long will it take for Fiori to time out ?
Also, please tell me how to calculate that time.

Personally, I recognize that the two parameters "http/security_session_timeout" and "rdisp/plugin_auto_logout" are related to the Fiori timeout time, and that the timeout is the sum of the values ​​of both parameters.
(Ex) Timeout in 30 minutes
①http/security_session_timeout = 1800
②rdisp/plugin_auto_logout = 1800
①+②=3600s (30min)

However, I do not understand the relation and behavior of http/security_session_timeout and rdisp/plugin_auto_logout.
I would appreciate it if you could explain it in detail.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Consuming SOAP service from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I get 500 Internal Server Error when I try

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA API for Multiple Asset Postings
entry.content:
Hi Rizzei,

The question "how to call the OData API to enable multiple assets posting" may have different answers depending on the technology stack and tools your team have. The answer may also be different depending on your specific business requirement, for example, how many assets do you want to post within one batch.

1) If your team have tech stacks like Java, Python,... you have the most flexibility to create an app/program which uploads data from excel (or other data source), builds OData request payload based on the data and the batch size, and finally calls the OData service and retrieves the status;

2) If your team are familiar with Excel VBA, it's also possible to use Excel VBA to read data from excel and call OData service accordingly;

 

Regards,

Guoqiang

entry.title: Re: provider contract inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Subbareddy,

Sorry for the late answer, I hadn't seen your new message.
The error you're getting is generated by the SOAP WS layer of the updater, in Convergent Charging. More precisely, it's related with the credentials sent by SOM.

To start with, you can already check the updater's logs (updater#x_LDF1*.log) to see if there's a more detailed message at the time of the error.
If you don't find anything relevant, your best bet is to enable the "WS" debug traces (in the CC updater, again), and to reproduce the issue. Normally, you'll then get detailed messages in the TRC file.

Here are already the most probable causes for issues of this kind:
- There's a large mismatch between the clocks of SOM and CC (and SOM writes the time within each query's header). As a precaution against forgery and "replay" attacks, the SOAP server rejects queries with an inconsistent time.
This is explained in detail in SAP note 2428165 ("web service requests rejected").
- Your SOAP client uses the credentials of an "individual" user. Depending on the system configuration of CC, you usually need a "service" user instead.
More details about this are provided in the CC Security guide (you may also have to check the "USER_ISOLATION_ENABLED" system parameter).
- The credentials of your SOAP client are actually wrong or expired.
One way to check that is to try them our in Core tool, or to update them completely.

Feel free to ask for more advice if needed.

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Master Blog Post
entry.content:
Thanks for all the incredible precious material you're sharing Jagmohan Singh!

I would like to ask you a comment about the differences between the Tasks described in the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer (e.g. https://go.support.sap.com/roadmapviewer/#/group//roadmapContentPage/a11ec6d657054bf9:FA163EAF25B21EEB8FC47DE9E72888DB) , the ones contained in the MS Excel file that can be downloaded with the Download icon for Project Plan (top level toolbar in the left) and those contained in SAP Cloud ALM for projects linked to the SAP ACTIVATE for SAP S/4HANA Private Edition.

I have the feeling they are similar but in the end non linked to the same data source. I believe SAL Cloud ALM tasks from SAP ACTIVATE are representing the best version to work on via SAP Cloud ALM but I cannot explain why there are differences between the different tools.

Thanks again for you effort and keep going sharing the different materials,

Sergio

entry.title: Disable / Remove "Default" PODs in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi,

How can the "Default" PODs be disabled / removed from the Launchpad for multiple users in SAP Digital Manufacturing? 

We have created custom PODs which have the buttons linked to custom PPDs but as it seems we cannot prevent users from accessing the Default PODs to carry out Start / Complete of different operations. This way they bypass the PPD as the buttons on the Default PODs are linked to the Start / Complete Plugins and they cannot be modified.

Thank you,

Istvan

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: BIT not generating from rated CIT
entry.content:
Hi Pratik,

As suggested by Ravi, you'll certainly find information in the charged item files (the output of the CC rater, comprised of CSV/GZ/ZIP files, and CTL files).
If it helps, you may also be interested in checking the logs of the bulkloader and of the rater.
Users sometimes run into issues after changing the structure of the BIT class in CI: these changes have to be manually reflected into CC. If you're facing that kind of problem, you should easily see it on the CC side.

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Consuming SOAP service from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: 1. Set Up the API : First, ensure that the API configuration for S/4HANA public is properly set up and ready for use. 2. Test the API : I recommend using SoapUI to test the API and verify that it is functioning correctly.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2024
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community members,

We are thrilled to announce that SAP Inside Track event happening in Hyderabad on 21 Sep 2024. Which will include an engaging day filled with insightful sessions on BTP, AI, SAP S/4HANA, and networking.

Date: Saturday 21st September 2024
Time: 9:00AM to 5:00 PM
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

Registrations are yet to Open 

Note: This is an In-person Event only

If you have any questions, please get in touch with us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.

thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP Rest Full Custom entities association is not wor...
entry.content:
Hi @MaryiaHlushko

Thank you for your answer that unblocked me.

But now I have a problem when I click on the lines to get the details.

 

The result I get is still the same rows except that in the debug my table has 2 different rows.

This is the debugger
Line 1

Line 2

Hoping someone can help me

Thanks you in advance for your reply

entry.title: Re: EDOC_COCKPIT - no content
entry.content: Hi. Did you solved it for now? I have also not content and customizing is done.

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Yes, we are supporting this. You have to add in the just ask homescreen (manage model section is not yet supported) -> model

entry.title: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
I want to change master data in Equipment master in PM module. is there any change mode in  "Migration Cockpit" ? , so that i can change the whichever data i want to

Eg. in LSMW we can do tcode wise recordig and create/change data as per owr comfort

#migrationcockpit #publiccolud

entry.title: Re: Tansfer balance between one customer to another custo...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

After consulting with experts, I can provide the following answer:

Firstly, use the Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) API to create two postings for customer A and B:

AR Customer A

Offset Account

 

Offset Account

AR Customer B

For more information, see blog: Payload Examples for API Journal Entry – Post

Then, use the Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) API to clear the two documents.

AR Customer B

AR Customer A 

For more information, see blog: A Simplified Guide to Effectively Use the Clearing API

 

Hope this helps.

Kind regards,

Anne

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 102139 to define DME user ID is unavailable.
entry.content:
Hello @FabioSpulveda 

Thank you for your question. We have forwarded it to the respective experts.

Best regards,

Anja

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content:
Yes, we are supporting this. But only on the Just ask homescreen, not yet in the 'manage model section'. When you are on the homescreen, you need to go to 'add model to search' in the model selection dropdown, then pick your Datasphere model.
If you are facing issues, feel free to ping me on Teams.

entry.title: Re: Let’s Fill the Office with Action Figures!
entry.content: @Zamichiei - I want to work in your office!! 😀

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

My name is Phung and I'm a Sap Role Developer from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP Authorization Development for the past two years. I recognized as a candidate for this certification since I am a woman and the first college graduate in my family. I enjoy working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's incredible to see how technology can have such a tremendous impact. I hope to continue learning and progressing in this industry in order to have a successful career.

I'm excited to take a free certification exam because I believe it will help me study more and improve my skills. I understand that the world of technology is constantly evolving, and I want to stay current with the latest innovations. I also hope that my future achievement will be a motivation for all of my colleagues too. I am glad for this chance and enthusiastic about the possibilities that lie ahead.

Thank you for taking the time to examine my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

Phung

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Yes, we are supporting this. But only on the Just ask homescreen, not yet in the 'manage model section'. When you are on the homescreen, you need to go to 'add model to search' in the model selection dropdown, then pick your Datasphere model. If you are facing issues, feel free to ping me on Teams.

entry.title: Using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to use sap mobile start and want to deploy the attachment service on BTP launchpad.

I had tried using standard attachmentReuseComponent but it didn't work in Cloud Foundry.

For this reason i am using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet.

I am using UploadSet to attach file.

   
<upload:UploadSet
                id="UploadSet"
                instantUpload="true"
                showIcons="true"
                uploadEnabled="true"
                afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded"
                terminationEnabled="true"
                fileTypes="txt,doc,png"
                maxFileNameLength="30"
                maxFileSize="200"
                mediaTypes="text/plain,application/msword,image/png"           
                uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet"
                items="{path: '/AttachmentContentSet', templateShareable: false}"
                mode="MultiSelect"
                selectionChanged="onSelectionChange">
            <upload:toolbar>
                <OverflowToolbar id="_IDGenOverflowToolbar1">
                    <ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer1"/>                         
 
                    <upload:UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder id="_IDGenUploadSetToolbarPlaceholder1" />
                </OverflowToolbar>
            </upload:toolbar>
            <upload:items>
           
            <upload:UploadSetItem
id="_IDGenUploadSktItem1"
url="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet
(DocumentInfoRecordDocType='{DocumentInfoRecordDocType}',DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber='{DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber}',
DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion='{DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion}',
DocumentInfoRecordDocPart='{DocumentInfoRecordDocPart}',
LogicalDocument='{LogicalDocument}',
ArchiveDocumentID='{ArchiveDocumentID}',
LinkedSAPObjectKey='{LinkedSAPObjectKey}',
BusinessObjectTypeName='{BusinessObjectTypeName}')/$value"
>
</upload:UploadSetItem>
            </upload:items>
        </upload:UploadSet>

When I do get call, the result is coming empty. Anyone has used the standard API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV before ?This has to be deployed to cloud Foundry.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA MANUAL FAILOVER HIGH AVAILABILITY SYSTEM REPLICATION ERROR
entry.content:
please add one more parameter

--replicationMode=syncmem

for more details, please find in below URL

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/4ae051981b1b4998b83741ccd2e95ce1.html?version=2.0.05

entry.title: Re: Is there a possibility to show description to input p...
entry.content:
Hello @sagarsv ,

when creating an input parameter define value help view - dimension in which you defined text association and that will resolve the issue.

entry.title: Any lessons learned from connecting SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center?
entry.content:
The Purpose: we decided to integrate SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center for US business.
The Challenge: ADP Workforce Now requires data transformations in our CSV export file that cannot be easily built because we do not have an If Then Logic. As a result, we can probably meet the requirements by sending 3 different files that follow different logic.
The question: Is there anyone who has successfully built such an integration using SF Integration Center?
If not, we would look at SAP's CPI capabilities. That's a big gun, though.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks @ShaneLipke. It worked, in addition to your suggested changes, I have also modified the value in CORS in Manager to "*". Earlier I have provided the URL but it was not working.

Follow up question: I have not configured SSO for Enable Now, so if the users open Fiori, it is asking them to sign in to Enable Now also. I understand the importance, but I feel it should not be mandatory. However, users can cancel the prompt. If they provided the Enable Now, they can able to see the contents flowing from the respective Enable Now workarea. This is completely fine. But the issue is, if the user ignores the Enable Now login prompt, they can't see the standard content too. I don't want this to happen.

What I want to achieve is, if the user has Enable Now credentials, they should see both the standard content from SAP Education server and custom content from my Manager workarea. If the user don't have Enable Now access, they users should see at least Standard content from SAP.  Appreciate your support.

entry.title: Getting records from SAP service layer SQLQueries endpoint using conditional parameters
entry.content:
Hi,
we are using SAP service layer and calling the endpoint /SQLQueries('test_contactemployee')/List

we have a following Sql query to get all the contact employees.

SELECT BP."CardCode", BP."CardName", CE."Name", CE."Position", CE."Address", BP."QryGroup1",
CE."Tel1" AS "Phone1", CE."Tel2" AS "Phone2", CE."Cellolar" AS "MobilePhone",
CE."Fax" AS "Fax", CE."E_MailL" AS "EMail",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "OCRD" BP2 JOIN "OCPR" CE2 ON BP2."CardCode" = CE2."CardCode") AS "@odata.count"
FROM "OCRD" BP
JOIN "OCPR" CE ON BP."CardCode" = CE."CardCode"
where BP."CardCode" = :CardCode


What we want to achieve is that if :CardCode is null then retrieve all records otherwise particular BP. And same goes for other parameters. What are the possibilities?

WHERE (:CardCode IS NULL OR BP."CardCode" = :CardCode)

entry.title: Re: Characteristic Combination aATP (ABC) "Usage does not exist"
entry.content: Hi How did you fix this issue? We are also not getting values in dropdowns.

entry.title: BUPA_DEL - AM048 & AM068 Errors
entry.content:
Dears,

Your kind expert advise is required. While trying to delete business partners using the BUPA_DEL, I am getting the errors AM068 & AM048.

Can you please guide on how to correct?

To note, archiving is not an option. The BPs need to be deleted.

Thanks.

entry.title: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?
entry.content:
Hi

I understand that outputting CSV files in S/4 HANA Public Cloud is difficult.
When attempting to output a PDF, an XML file is generated in the background and then converted to PDF.

Question 1: Is there a location where the XML file is stored in the background? Or is the XML file deleted as a cache file during PDF generation?

Question 2: If we cannot access the XML file as mentioned above, I'm considering connecting the purchase order number with BTP through email sending settings, accessing the purchase order data on the BTP side, and creating a CSV file. Are there any other good alternative solutions?

entry.title: Re: purchasing groups value limits
entry.content: Hello Akshay, I would like to know is there any possibility to restrict purchasing groups to create purchase orders according to value limit or any possibility to get notifications to purchasing group people that somebody used their purchasing group

entry.title: MD04 dialog box issue
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I searched but seems that this error doesn't be know.

In MD04 when I go into a first production order, the dialog box pop up whith the right informations.

But after that when I go in a second production order, the dialog box shows the information of the first one. But if I want to make confirmation it jumps to the right production order in the CO02.

 

Do someone have any idea about that topic?

Many thanks in advance for your advices.

Best regards

entry.title: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was converting planned order to purchase requsition ,it showing me warning message "Regard the export control protocol!"

It is YM721 message

Please provide advice.

entry.title: SAP Netweaver and SAP Business Suite Foundation in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

we have developed an SAP application with the following system requirements:

  • SAP Netweaver in der Version 7.53

  • SAP Business Suite Foundation (SAP_BS_FND) 

 

Does the SAP BTP support these system requirements, so that we can run our application in the SAP BTP?

Thank you

entry.title: I want to export or save an invoice as an xml file.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

i want to save / export an invoice as an xml file.

I tried it via output management and store the file in the archive System with data type xml. But it is still show in PDF. 

i also try to use EDOC_COCKPIT (eDocument). All customizings are done. But no edocument is created, when i create a invoice via FV01. I also not sure, if i need there a licence for that. 

It is my first time to be here in the community. 

It would be pleasure, if someone could have any nice Inputs here. 

Thanks a lot. 

 

Regarding Stefan

entry.title: Direct Store Delivery on S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Please I am asking if Direct Store Delivery (DSD) is supported on S/4HANA Public Cloud or not?  As I could not found in the S4HANA Public Cloud features

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA MANUAL FAILOVER HIGH AVAILABILITY SYSTEM REPLICATION ERROR
entry.content: Its already added hdbnsutil -sr_register --name=sh --remoteHost=PH --remoteInstance=00 -- replicationMode=syncmem

entry.title: Re: Extending Fiori Elements, make a field read-only

entry.title: Re: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content: YM721 is a custom message - ask your developers.

entry.title: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributor
Duplication AND connection in SAP dependencies
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to realize the following in object dependencies:

$SELF.Z_D4 = 600,
AND
$SELF.Z_D4_Z = 5

if

Z_MATERIAL_PRICE_GROUP = '88'
AND
Z_PRODUCT_SIZE = 80.

My problem is that the double execution of a characteristic cannot be realized and SAP runs into error E28024.

My goal is that if Z_MATERIAL_PRICE_GROUP= '88' and Z_PRODUCT_SIZE = 80, then $SELF.Z_D4 = 600 and $SELF.Z_D4_Z = 5


How can I best realize this? Many thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: Re: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributo
entry.content:
"My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributor"

As an Integration Consultant, I specialize in integration middleware, including Integration Suite, PI/PO, and other middleware solutions. I am passionate about engaging with the community as a speaker and blogger, sharing insights and knowledge in these areas. I take great pride in contributing to community events and helping others enhance their skills through my content.

entry.title: How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
entry.content:
Hi
How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
In the image below, the last value is June 21, 2024. If June 22, 2024, arrives, then the input filter should change from June 21, 2024, to June 22, 2024."

Regards
Thayu

Welcome aboard! You've come to the right place.

I've sent you an invite. Let me know if you need any help finding learning content.

entry.title: BusinessCharacter code values in OrganizationalCenterActivation web service interface response
entry.content:
What is the significance of BusinessCharacter code values in the response from the OrganizationalCenterActivation web service interface?

For instance, which codes (e.g., 1, 2, 9, 13) correspond to "Company," "Segment," "Business Residence," and "Profit Center," respectively?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BusinessCharacter code values in OrganizationalCenter...
entry.content:
Hi,

The BusinessCharacter code values are mapped as below:

1        Company
12        Program
13        Permanent Establishment
14        Functional Unit
2        Segment
3        Profit Center
4        Cost Center
9        Reporting Line Unit

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purchase BOM (bill of material) concept in standard P...
entry.content: Hi Sanan,
